search_queries_used: site:nature.com Pituitary Society 2025 incidentaloma consensus headache visual fields hormones
rejection_reasons: Patient pages are not clinician guidance.
Non-official symptom lists were not accepted.
population_applicability: Partial: the source is an adult pituitary-incidentaloma consensus while the legacy workflow is broad and unrestricted.
setting_applicability: Partial: exact for selected pituitary symptom, endocrine, imaging, visual, and consultation documentation, not diagnosis or treatment.
UAE_applicability: No exact UAE pituitary guideline was identified. International consultation and follow-up pathways require UAE clinician review.
recency_verification: The official 2025 Nature consensus page was reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: The 2025 Pituitary Society consensus is current; older guidance was not selected.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped pituitary symptom identity, headache, visual, fatigue, and acute-visual-loss prompt fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports headache, visual loss or blurring, diplopia, cranial-neuropathy, fatigue, and altered-mental-status context as clinician-recorded symptoms or prompts.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped clinician-arranged specialist referral documentation with qualifying features retained.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports endocrinology or neurosurgery consultation documentation in qualified severe-headache, visual-deficit, hormone-symptom, lesion, or pregnancy contexts.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped reproductive, galactorrhoea, and hormone-profile review fields without inferring a disorder.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports pituitary hormone-profile review and relevant reproductive or prolactin symptom context without inferring hormone deficiency or excess.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped pituitary imaging, visual-field, and visual-acuity documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports pituitary imaging review, visual fields, and visual-acuity documentation in recommendation-qualified contexts.

unresolved_source_gaps: The broad symptoms workflow does not encode incidentaloma, adult, lesion-size, pregnancy, endocrine, or surgical qualifiers.

Seizure, neurological screen, general appearance, growth or weight change, hand or foot size, thirst or urine output, bone or joint pain, previous records, hormone replacement, generic clinician plan, follow-up, fixed intervals, PRN wording, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, hormone-result interpretation, hormone replacement, treatment, surgery, referral urgency, and exact follow-up timing remain clinician responsibilities.
